'''âth-g-y''' ('''shathagay''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:nectarize|nectarize]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| th-g-y
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nectarize|nectarize]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âth-g-y
|-
! Lemma
| shathagay
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thithagay|thithagay]] || [[word:jithagay|jithagay]] || [[word:shithagay|shithagay]] || [[word:kithagay|kithagay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthuthagay|thuthuthagay]] || [[word:jujuthagay|jujuthagay]] || [[word:shushuthagay|shushuthagay]] || [[word:kukuthagay|kukuthagay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thuthagay|thuthagay]] || [[word:juthagay|juthagay]] || [[word:shuthagay|shuthagay]] || [[word:kuthagay|kuthagay]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thuthagay|thuthagay]] || [[word:juthagay|juthagay]] || [[word:shuthagay|shuthagay]] || [[word:kuthagay|kuthagay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thethagay|thethagay]] || [[word:jethagay|jethagay]] || [[word:shethagay|shethagay]] || [[word:kethagay|kethagay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothothagay|thothothagay]] || [[word:jojothagay|jojothagay]] || [[word:shoshothagay|shoshothagay]] || [[word:kokothagay|kokothagay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thothagay|thothagay]] || [[word:jothagay|jothagay]] || [[word:shothagay|shothagay]] || [[word:kothagay|kothagay]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thothagay|thothagay]] || [[word:jothagay|jothagay]] || [[word:shothagay|shothagay]] || [[word:kothagay|kothagay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠthagay|thĂŠthagay]] || [[word:jĂŠthagay|jĂŠthagay]] || [[word:shĂŠthagay|shĂŠthagay]] || [[word:kĂŠthagay|kĂŠthagay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathathagay|thathathagay]] || [[word:jajathagay|jajathagay]] || [[word:shashathagay|shashathagay]] || [[word:kakathagay|kakathagay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thathagay|thathagay]] || [[word:jathagay|jathagay]] || [[word:shathagay|shathagay]] || [[word:kathagay|kathagay]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thathagay|thathagay]] || [[word:jathagay|jathagay]] || [[word:shathagay|shathagay]] || [[word:kathagay|kathagay]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shathagay|shathagay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshathagay|goshathagay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishathagay|gokishathagay]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shathagaynĂŒ|shathagaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshathagaynknĂŒ|goshathagaynknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishathagaynĂŒ|gokishathagaynĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shathagayshĂ«|shathagayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshathagaynkshĂ«|goshathagaynkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishathagayshĂ«|gokishathagayshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathagayro|shathagayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathagaynkro|goshathagaynkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathagayro|gokishathagayro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shathagaymu|shathagaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathagaynkmu|goshathagaynkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathagaymu|gokishathagaymu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shathagaysher|shathagaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshathagaynksher|goshathagaynksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishathagaysher|gokishathagaysher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shathagayng|shathagayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshathagaynkng|goshathagaynkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishathagayng|gokishathagayng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shathagaya|shathagaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshathagaynkya|goshathagaynkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishathagaya|gokishathagaya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shathagayam|shathagayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshathagaynkyam|goshathagaynkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishathagayam|gokishathagayam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathagaynĂŒshĂ«|shathagaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathagaynknĂŒshĂ«|goshathagaynknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathagaynĂŒshĂ«|gokishathagaynĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathagaynĂŒro|shathagaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathagaynknĂŒro|goshathagaynknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathagaynĂŒro|gokishathagaynĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathagaynĂŒmu|shathagaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathagaynknĂŒmu|goshathagaynknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathagaynĂŒmu|gokishathagaynĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathagayshĂ«nĂŒ|shathagayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathagaynkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshathagaynkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathagayshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishathagayshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathagayshĂ«ro|shathagayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathagaynkshĂ«ro|goshathagaynkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathagayshĂ«ro|gokishathagayshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathagayshĂ«mu|shathagayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathagaynkshĂ«mu|goshathagaynkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathagayshĂ«mu|gokishathagayshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathagayronĂŒ|shathagayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathagaynkronĂŒ|goshathagaynkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathagayronĂŒ|gokishathagayronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathagayroshĂ«|shathagayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathagaynkroshĂ«|goshathagaynkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathagayroshĂ«|gokishathagayroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shathagayromu|shathagayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshathagaynkromu|goshathagaynkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishathagayromu|gokishathagayromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shathagaymunĂŒ|shathagaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshathagaynkmunĂŒ|goshathagaynkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishathagaymunĂŒ|gokishathagaymunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shathagaymushĂ«|shathagaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshathagaynkmushĂ«|goshathagaynkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishathagaymushĂ«|gokishathagaymushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shathagaymuro|shathagaymuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshathagaynkmuro|goshathagaynkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishathagaymuro|gokishathagaymuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
